A '''cairoka''' was a type of creature capable of flight and found on the [[planet]] [[Alderaan]]. They had wings as [[Color|white]] as [[Water|snow]].<ref name="Life Day" /> By [[1 BBY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Star Wars: Galactic Atlas: Updated Edition]]'' dates [[Destruction of Alderaan|the Disaster]] to [[1 BBY]]. As [[Rel (Alderaanian)|Rel's]] viewing of the cairoka takes place on [[Alderaan]] before its destruction, the events must have transpired by 1 [['ABY-BBY' dating system|BBY]].</ref> the [[Alderaanian]] [[youngling]] [[Rel (Alderaanian)|Rel]] watched cairoka fly over some [[tree]]s on Alderaan.<ref name="Life Day" />

==Behind the scenes==
Cairoka appeared in the new ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[canon]] in "[[The Song of Winter's Heart]]," a short story written by [[Cavan Scott]] and [[George Mann]] in the [[2021]] ''[[Life Day Treasury]]'' anthology.<ref name="Life Day" /> In the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity, [[Cairoka/Legends|cairoka]]s appeared in the [[1994]] novel ''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]'', written by [[Dave Wolverton]].<ref name="Courtship">''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]''</ref>
